scan.title: Rescue Receipt
scan.subtitle: Scan or upload a physical receipt to transform it.

alerts.invalid_format: Please use JPEG or PNG format

warnings.mismatch_desc: We detected a price mismatch. Please check the line items.

alerts.storage_full: Storage may be full or unavailable.

history.title: History
history.empty_desc: Scan your physical receipts to transform them into structured intelligence.

analyze.title: Intelligence
analyze.subtitle: Advanced patterns and spending analysis.
analyze.coming_soon_desc: We're building automated price comparisons and category-level spending trends to help you optimize every purchase.

api_errors.NOT_A_RECEIPT: This image is not a shopping receipt — try a different photo.
api_errors.AI_RESPONSE_PARSE_FAILED: We could not read this receipt right now. Please try again in a moment.
api_errors.UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE: Unsupported file type or size — use a JPEG or PNG up to 10 MB.
api_errors.HTTP_429: Too many requests — please wait a bit before scanning again.
api_errors.HTTP_502: Receipt service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
api_errors.HTTP_503: Receipt service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
api_errors.generic: We could not read this receipt. Please try again with a clearer photo.
